build.beforeDevCommand: wasm-pack build src-rhwp --target web --dev && npm --prefix src-rhwp/rhwp-studio install && npm --prefix src-rhwp/rhwp-studio run dev
build.beforeBuildCommand: wasm-pack build src-rhwp --target web && npm --prefix src-rhwp/rhwp-studio install && npm --prefix src-rhwp/rhwp-studio run build
